title: The Unreleased Axolotl Pack
description: This pack adds 13 new or should i say 13 of the unreleased/scarped versions of Axolotls we were supposed to get
body:
What does the pack add:

This pack adds 13 new or should i say 13 of the unreleasd/scarped versions that Axolotls were to get

1 new varient for the wild axolotl

1 new varient for the blue axolotl

2 new varient for the gold axolotl

3 new varient for the lucy axolotl

7 new varient for the cyan axolotl

Why should you download this:

Introducing the Unreleased Axolotls Pack:

Dive into the vibrant depths of Minecraft like never before with this exclusive resource pack tailored specifically for the forthcoming axolotl addition! Immerse yourself in an aquatic wonderland with meticulously crafted textures, animations, and sounds that bring these adorable amphibians to life. From their playful movements to their unique behaviors, every detail has been meticulously designed to enhance your axolotl experience. Whether you're exploring underwater caverns or building your own aquatic paradise, this resource pack is your essential companion for all things axolotl-related. Get ready to embark on a new adventure filled with charm, excitement, and the delightful presence of Minecraft's newest inhabitants!

There is a bug:

Report here: https://discord.gg/x7BstrDpPD

Want to chat: https://discord.gg/x7BstrDpPD

Questions: https://discord.gg/x7BstrDpPD
